name: Daniel Tosh
bio: Daniel Tosh is an American comedian and television host known for deliberately offensive, deadpan dark comedy. He built his name through Comedy Central specials beginning with Completely Serious before hosting the long-running clip-commentary series Tosh.0 from 2009 to 2020. His material and on-air style have drawn periodic controversy.

timeline.ev: Stand-up set on The Late Show with David Letterman accelerates his career
Comedy Central special Completely Serious airs
Comedy Central special Happy Thoughts premieres

accolades: Host of Tosh.0, one of Comedy Centrals longest-running series
Comedy Central specials Completely Serious and Happy Thoughts
Among the top-grossing touring comedians of his era
